name: Minion Assembly
author: Vieti
bootlegger: If Poppy Grower is in play, Kazali chooses which minion character is in play but not the minion players
If Poppygrower is in play, Wraith doesn't wake with evil. The Storyteller may instruct the Wraith to keep their eyes closed while evil players act (optional)
If the Exorcist chooses the player holding Lil’ Monsta, Lil’ Monsta cannot kill or move tonight
